mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_size AS productSize, p.storage_temperature AS storageTemperature, p.expiration_date AS expirationDate, c1.category_name AS categoryName, c2.category_name AS subCategoryName FROM product p JOIN c_mid_level c2 ON p.category_mid_id = c2.category_mid_id JOIN category_main c1 ON c2.category_main_id = c1.category_id WHERE p.business_id IN ( SELECT business_id FROM business_table WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product ( product_name, product_size, storage_temperature, expiration_date, category_mid_id, business_id ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{productSize}, #{storageTemperature}, #{expirationDate}, #{categoryMidId}, (SELECT business_id FROM business_table WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1) )
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_name = #{productName}, -- 제품명 product_size = #{productSize}, -- 제품 크기 storage_temperature = #{storageTemperature}, -- 보관 온도 expiration_date = #{expirationDate}, -- 유통기한 category_mid_id = #{categoryMidId} -- 중분류 ID WHERE product_id = #{productId} -- 수정 대상 제품 ID
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM product WHERE product_id = #{productId} -- 삭제할 제품 ID
mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS categoryId, category_name AS categoryName FROM category_main ORDER BY category_id ASC
SELECT category_mid_id AS categoryMidId, category_name AS categoryName, category_main_id AS categoryMainId FROM c_mid_level ORDER BY category_main_id ASC, category_mid_id ASC
